summary: Iteration 93 - Employee Offboarding Enhancement. All features verified: Resign dialog with 3 exit types, Settlement dialog with clearance checklist, Settlement PDF download, End-of-Contract EOS calculation. Backend: 8/8 tests passed. Frontend: All flows working.
critical_code_review_comments: employees.py (lines 155-184): Resign endpoint correctly handles 3 exit types (resigned, terminated, end_of_contract) with proper clearance initialization
employees.py (lines 199-307): Settlement calculation correctly implements Saudi Labor Law - end_of_contract uses termination calculation (full EOS benefits)
employees.py (lines 310-456): Settlement PDF generation using ReportLab with proper table formatting and clearance checklist
EmployeesPage.jsx (lines 790-808): Exit type cards with proper styling and EOS info messages
EmployeesPage.jsx (lines 918-940): Clearance checkbox list with real-time API updates via PUT /api/employees/{id}/clearance
seed_data_creation: Used existing test employee 'aaaa' (ID: b3f8cc87-7886-4724-bcdd-854ec64ca62a) with end_of_contract status
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 93 verified employee offboarding features: 1) Resign dialog has 3 exit types with different EOS info cards, 2) Settlement dialog shows clearance checklist with toggleable checkboxes that persist via API, 3) Settlement breakdown shows pending salary, leave encashment, EOS benefit (termination/resignation calculation), loan deduction, total, 4) PDF download generates settlement_employeename.pdf with all details, 5) Complete Exit button deactivates account. Test employee 'aaaa' is in end_of_contract status with some clearance items checked.

POST /api/employees/{id}/complete-exit.note: Not tested to preserve test data

Resign Dialog.dynamic_labels: Date label and EOS info change based on exit type

Settlement Dialog.settlement_breakdown: Shows pending salary, leave encashment, EOS benefit, loan deduction, total

end_of_contract.formula: 1/2 salary per year (first 5 years) + full salary per year (after 5 years)
end_of_contract.note: End of Contract gets full EOS benefits per Saudi Labor Law

resignation.formula: 0 if <2 years, 1/3 salary per year (2-5 years), 2/3 per year (5-10 years), full after 10 years
